report.title: Report errors to Rocket.Chat
report.description: Anonymously report issues to app developers. Shared information includes app version number, operating system type, workspace URL, device language and error type. No content or usernames are shared.
report.masDescription: This option is disabled when installed from the Mac App Store. Errors are reported through the Mac App Store error report process.

flashFrame.title: Flash frame
flashFrame.description: Flash window when a new message is received.
flashFrame.onLinux: Some Linux distros don't have support for this feature.
flashFrame.descriptionDarwin: Dock icon bounces when a new message is received.

hardwareAcceleration.title: Hardware acceleration
hardwareAcceleration.description: Improves visual rendering and performance. Disable if you experience visual glitches or instability.

videoCallScreenCaptureFallback.title: Video call screen capture fallback
videoCallScreenCaptureFallback.description: Disable Windows Graphics Capture so screen sharing works in Remote Desktop sessions.
videoCallScreenCaptureFallback.hint: App restarts when this option is changed.
videoCallScreenCaptureFallback.forcedDescription: Currently enforced because the app detected a Remote Desktop session. Toggle now controls future launches when running locally.

internalVideoChatWindow.title: Video calls inside app
internalVideoChatWindow.description: Open video calls inside app window instead of browser. Google Meet and Jitsi calls can only open in browser.
internalVideoChatWindow.masDescription: This option is disabled when installed from the Mac App Store. For security reasons, video calls always open in the browser by default.

minimizeOnClose.title: Minimize on close
minimizeOnClose.description: Minimize and do not quit app when closing.

menubar.title: Menu bar
menubar.description: Show menu bar on the top of the window.
menubar.disabledHint: Cannot disable menu bar when the workspace bar is disabled. App settings would become inaccessible.

sidebar.title: Workspace bar
sidebar.description: Show workspace list with downloads and settings buttons.
sidebar.disabledHint: Cannot disable workspace bar when the menu bar is disabled. App settings would become inaccessible.

trayIcon.title: Tray icon
trayIcon.description: Show tray icon on system tray. Instead of quitting, app is hidden to tray on close when enabled.
trayIcon.descriptionDarwin: Show app icon in menu bar.

availableBrowsers.title: Default browser
availableBrowsers.description: Choose which browser to open external links in.

telephonyServer.title: Telephony workspace
telephonyServer.description: Choose which workspace handles incoming phone calls (tel: and callto: links).

clearPermittedScreenCaptureServers.title: Clear screen capture permissions
clearPermittedScreenCaptureServers.description: Clear permissions even if “do not ask again” was previously selected for calling.

allowScreenCaptureOnVideoCalls.title: Allow screen capture on video calls
allowScreenCaptureOnVideoCalls.description: Allow screen capture on video calls. Asks for permission on each video call.

ntlmCredentials.title: NTLM credentials
ntlmCredentials.description: Allow NTLM credentials to be used when connecting to a workspace.
ntlmCredentials.domains: Domains that will be used as the credentials. Separated by comma. Use * for match all servers.

videoCallWindowPersistence.title: Retain video call window position
videoCallWindowPersistence.description: Remember position and size of video call window between sessions.

outlookCalendarSyncInterval.title: Outlook Calendar sync interval
outlookCalendarSyncInterval.description: Frequency of calendar events update checks in minutes (1–60).

verboseOutlookLogging.title: Verbose Outlook Calendar logging
verboseOutlookLogging.description: Enable detailed Exchange/NTLM debug logs for troubleshooting Outlook Calendar integration issues.

detailedEventsLogging.title: Detailed events logging
detailedEventsLogging.description: Log full event data exchanged between Outlook and Rocket.Chat during calendar sync. Useful for diagnosing sync issues.

debugLogging.title: Verbose logging
debugLogging.description: Writes all console output to the log file. When disabled, only errors and important messages are saved, keeping logs smaller and focused.

e2ePdfPreviewSizeLimit.title: PDF preview size limit in encrypted rooms (MB)
e2ePdfPreviewSizeLimit.description: Encrypted files are loaded into memory for previews. Files larger than this limit will be downloaded directly.
